questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the `su` command in a UNIX system?
questions.hint: Enter the primary purpose of the su command

questions.question: Suppose you want to execute a command as the root user but you currently do not have the root password. What command can you use to achieve this?
questions.hint: Enter the su command used to execute a command as the root user without the root password

questions.hint: Enter the difference between su and su - commands
